hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx @biomejs/biome check --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

PreToolUse.matcher: Bash(npm run deploy*)|Bash(wrangler deploy*)|Bash(npx wrangler deploy*)

hooks.command: echo 'Blocked: deploys run via Cloudflare Git integration on push to main. Running wrangler deploy manually causes intermittent stale deploys. See CLAUDE.md §Commands.' >&2; exit 2

jq -r 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("src/analyzers/mta-sts\\.ts$")) then (.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // "") else "" end' | grep -qE 'redirect:[[:space:]]*"(error|follow)"' && { echo 'Blocked: MTA-STS fetch must use redirect: "manual" (RFC 8461 §3.3). This regressed twice via PRs #58 and #92 — see CLAUDE.md §Security.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
